title: Behind-the-Scenes Candid Bathroom Selfie
promptText: In a candid, behind-the-scenes style photo, a conventionally attractive young czech woman with a slender build is posed centrally with her hands lifting her long, brown hair, a gesture that raises her arms to accentuate her bust, and she gazes upward past the camera with a neutral expression and slightly open mouth, revealing defined eyebrows, brown eyes, and skin that has a slight oily shine and visible moles on her torso, indoor bathroom setting with tiled walls and a visible recessed ceiling light, low-resolution grainy video still from a smartphone, captured from a straight-on, waist-up perspective under mixed overhead and soft frontal lighting.
